meta.title: Mycelium Network - Living Knowledge Graph | ClawGuru
meta.description: Discover Mycelium, the living, self-evolving knowledge network with 4.2 million security runbooks. Visualize your organization's intelligence as a connected graph that grows and learns.
meta.keywords: Mycelium network, living knowledge graph, security runbooks, distributed intelligence, knowledge management, enterprise security, collective intelligence
meta.og_description: Your knowledge, visualized as a living graph that evolves with 4.2 million security runbooks and collective intelligence.

hero.title: Your Knowledge, Visualized
hero.subtitle: A living graph that evolves with your organization
hero.description: Mycelium transforms your organization's knowledge into a living, self-evolving network. With 4.2 million security runbooks and collective intelligence from thousands of organizations, it's the most advanced knowledge management system ever built.

what_is_mycelium.title: What is Mycelium?
what_is_mycelium.subtitle: The Future of Knowledge Management
what_is_mycelium.description: Mycelium is not just another knowledge base. It's a living, breathing network that learns, adapts, and evolves with your organization. Like biological mycelium networks that connect entire forests, our digital version connects knowledge across your entire enterprise.

core_concepts.title: Living Network
core_concepts.description: A dynamic graph structure that grows and reorganizes based on usage patterns and emerging needs.

core_concepts.title: Collective Intelligence
core_concepts.description: Learns from every interaction across all participating organizations to continuously improve knowledge quality.

core_concepts.title: Real-time Evolution
core_concepts.description: Adapts and evolves 15,000+ times per hour based on new threats, solutions, and organizational needs.

core_concepts.title: Security-First Design
core_concepts.description: Built with zero-trust architecture and military-grade encryption for complete knowledge protection.

sections.title: Graph Architecture
sections.description: At its core, Mycelium uses a sophisticated graph database structure that represents knowledge as interconnected nodes and relationships.

sections.title: Evolution Engine
sections.description: Our proprietary AI continuously analyzes usage patterns, success rates, and emerging threats to evolve the knowledge network.

sections.title: Node Intelligence
sections.description: Each knowledge node contains embedded intelligence that enables self-organization and optimization.

sections.title: Collective Learning
sections.description: Knowledge from thousands of organizations flows through the network, creating a powerful collective intelligence effect.

architecture.title: Architecture Overview
architecture.subtitle: Technical Foundation
architecture.description: Mycelium's architecture combines cutting-edge graph technology, AI evolution engines, and distributed security protocols.

layers.name: Knowledge Layer
layers.description: 4.2 million+ security runbooks and organizational knowledge represented as semantic nodes

layers.name: Intelligence Layer
layers.description: AI-powered evolution engine that continuously optimizes and grows the network

layers.name: Network Layer

layers.name: Security Layer
layers.description: Zero-trust architecture with end-to-end encryption and access control

mermaid_diagram.title: Mycelium Architecture Diagram
mermaid_diagram.description: High-level architecture showing the four-layer structure and data flow
mermaid_diagram.code:
graph TB
    subgraph "Knowledge Layer"
        A[Runbook Nodes] --> B[Procedure Nodes]
        B --> C[Threat Nodes]
        C --> D[Solution Nodes]
        D --> E[Connection Edges]
    end
    subgraph "Intelligence Layer"
        F[ML Models] --> G[Evolution Algorithms]
        G --> H[Quality Assessment]
        H --> I[Predictive Analytics]
    end
    subgraph "Network Layer"
        J[Graph Database] --> K[Node Management]
        K --> L[Connection Routing]
        L --> M[Load Balancing]
    end
    subgraph "Security Layer"
        N[Encryption] --> O[Authentication]
        O --> P[Authorization]
        P --> Q[Audit Trails]
    end
    E --> F
    I --> J
    M --> N

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Mycelium Network

questions.question: How is Mycelium different from traditional knowledge bases?
questions.answer: Traditional knowledge bases are static repositories that require manual updates. Mycelium is a living network that automatically evolves, learns from usage patterns, and incorporates collective intelligence from thousands of organizations. It grows 15,000+ times per hour based on real-world needs and emerging threats.

questions.question: How does the collective intelligence feature work?
questions.answer: Mycelium anonymizes and aggregates knowledge patterns from all participating organizations. When one organization solves a new problem or discovers a better approach, that intelligence flows through the network, benefiting all participants while maintaining complete privacy and confidentiality.

questions.question: Is our organizational data secure in Mycelium?
questions.answer: Absolutely. Mycelium uses zero-trust architecture with end-to-end encryption. Your sensitive data never leaves your environment, and only anonymized patterns and insights are shared. We maintain zero known breaches and comply with all major security standards including SOC 2, ISO 27001, and GDPR.

questions.question: How quickly can we implement Mycelium?
questions.answer: Implementation typically takes 2-4 weeks depending on your requirements. We start with importing your existing knowledge, then connect your systems, and finally enable the evolution engine. Most organizations see value within the first month of deployment.

questions.question: What types of knowledge can Mycelium manage?
questions.answer: Mycelium excels at security knowledge, operational procedures, compliance requirements, threat intelligence, and best practices. It can handle structured procedures, unstructured insights, and everything in between. The 4.2 million security runbooks are just the starting point.

questions.question: How does the evolution engine work?
questions.answer: Our AI continuously analyzes usage patterns, success rates, emerging threats, and organizational needs. It identifies opportunities for improvement, creates new connections between knowledge nodes, and evolves procedures based on real-world feedback from thousands of implementations.

questions.question: Can we customize Mycelium for our specific needs?
questions.answer: Yes, Mycelium is highly customizable. You can create custom knowledge nodes, define evolution rules, integrate with your specific tools, and even train custom AI models on your organizational patterns. Enterprise plans include dedicated support for customization.

questions.question: What happens to our knowledge if we stop using Mycelium?
questions.answer: Your knowledge always belongs to you. We provide complete export capabilities in multiple formats, ensuring you can migrate your knowledge at any time. The evolution insights and collective intelligence benefits would cease, but your core knowledge remains yours.

questions.question: How does Mycelium handle regulatory compliance?
questions.answer: Mycelium includes built-in compliance frameworks for major regulations like GDPR, HIPAA, PCI DSS, and industry-specific requirements. The evolution engine automatically updates procedures as regulations change, ensuring continuous compliance.

questions.question: What kind of support do you provide?
questions.answer: We provide 24/7 technical support for all plans. Professional and Enterprise plans include dedicated account managers, priority response times, and on-premise support options. We also offer comprehensive training and change management assistance.
